## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration and discuss Adauris' audio content solution and fwd.digital's content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Adauris transforms written content into audio versions, distributing across 19+ podcast platforms with SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content marketing services, from strategy to creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Both companies see potential for collaboration, especially in programmatic content creation and cross-promotion](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Adauris is preparing for pre-seed fundraising and considering investing in their own content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Topics

### Adauris' Audio Content Solution

  - [Transforms written content into branded podcast-style audio](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Works with 200+ publications, including Grist and Texas Tribune](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Generates custom landing pages for each audio piece with SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Offers personalized audio snippets for sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Uses AI to create brand-specific audio hosts](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Integrates with 19+ podcast platforms and provides backlinks to source content](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Marketing Services

  - [Offers end-to-end content marketing solutions for companies from seed to public stage](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Uses AI-powered workflows combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Services include content strategy, keyword clustering, research, writing, and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Provides link-building services using AI outbound techniques](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000 per month for baseline package](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Implementing Adauris' audio solution for fwd.digital's clients to improve engagement and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content creation for agencies and publishers](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Cross-promotion and client referrals between the two companies](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Market Validation and Growth Strategies

  - [Adauris focusing on marketing teams and agencies as primary targets](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [fwd.digital suggests narrowing focus and proving ROI through case studies](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Importance of demonstrating clear product-market fit before heavy content marketing investment](https://fathom.video/share/1hmFnm7axJ1MHeor3sFLZe7zAzstxVdx?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

## Next Steps
